distilleries.name: Bestillo Pálinkaház
distilleries.description: Small family distillery in Boldogkőváralja in the Zemplén foothills near the Tokaj wine route. Specialises in Gönci apricot pálinka (protected designation of origin) and Aszú-pomace aged pálinka; also produces a contemporary gin. National awards for quality.
distilleries.distillation_method: Traditional double small-pot distillation; Gönci apricot and local orchard fruits
distilleries.tasting_program: Pálinka tastings and complimentary distillery demonstrations; weekdays 8-16; Saturdays 10-18

distilleries.name: Szóráth Kisüsti Pálinka
distilleries.description: Family distillery operating since the early 1990s across two locations in the UNESCO World Heritage zone of Tokaj-Hegyalja and adjacent Gönci apricot PDO territory. Makes varietal grape and pomace pálinkas from Furmint, Hárslevelű, and Muscat Lunel using traditional double small-pot technique.
distilleries.distillation_method: Traditional double small-pot (kisüsti) distillation; grape and pomace varieties
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery visits by appointment; portfolio includes Tokaj varietal grape and pomace pálinkas

distilleries.name: Seven Hills Distillery
distilleries.description: Craft distillery established 2020 in a renovated farmhouse in Bodrogkisfalud, on the Bodrog river in the Tokaj wine region. Tokaj Gin, launched 2021, won World's Best Contemporary Style Gin at the World Gin Awards. Also produces Furmint-based vodka and whisky aged in Tokaj barrels.
distilleries.distillation_method: Modern craft distillation; Tokaj wine-region botanicals; Tokaj barrel finishing for gin and whisky
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery tours by appointment weekdays 9-16; Seven Cocktail Bar on-site; spirits tasting sessions

distilleries.name: Panyolai Szilvórium
distilleries.description: Distillery with a pálinka tradition dating to 1732 in the village of Panyola, Szatmár-Bereg county, adjacent to the Tokaj region. Specialises in aged Szatmári plum pálinka in mulberry casks; multiple Grand Prix awards. The Elixír range ages in mulberry wood for a golden colour and complex flavour.
distilleries.distillation_method: Traditional double distillation; mulberry-cask ageing for the Elixír range; protected-origin Szatmár plum
distilleries.tasting_program: Tasting and programme events available; weekdays 8-16:30; contact info@panyolai.hu

distilleries.name: Tokaj Spirit Hegyaljai Törkölypálinka
distilleries.description: Producer specialising in törkölypálinka distilled from Tokaj-Hegyalja grape pomace. Makes hegyaljai törkölypálinka from the pressed pomace of Furmint and Hárslevelű, the principal grape varieties of the Tokaj wine region.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pomace distillation from Tokaj-Hegyalja grape varieties
distilleries.tasting_program: Products available in Hungarian retail and online

distilleries.name: AM-Tokaj Pálinka and Distillate
distilleries.classification: Pálinka; Tokaj grape and lees distillate
distilleries.description: Small Tokaj-area producer making pálinka from Furmint and Hárslevelű grape pomace and lees from the Tokaj-Hegyalja winemaking season. Also makes plum, apricot, and pear varieties; honey-enriched aged expressions.
distilleries.distillation_method: Traditional pomace and lees distillation; honey-bed ageing for specialty variants

distilleries.name: Disznókő Törkölypálinka (Estate Cellar Door)
distilleries.description: Disznókő estate produces törkölypálinka from the pressed pomace of its Furmint and Hárslevelű grapes. Available at the estate wine shop and cellar door alongside the full Tokaji wine range. Estate cellar seasonal opening May to October.
distilleries.distillation_method: Grape pomace distillation from Tokaj-Hegyalja varieties
distilleries.tasting_program: Available at the wine boutique and Sárga Borház restaurant on-site; seasonal

distilleries.name: Brill Pálinkaház
distilleries.description: Family-owned distillery operating since 2000 in Harc, Tolna county, making pálinka from carefully selected fruits and Tokaj aszú pomace. Best pálinka title awarded for matured Kadarka Pomace Pálinka; Tokaji Aszú pomace pálinka made from berries sourced from the wine region.
distilleries.distillation_method: Traditional double small-pot distillation; Tokaji aszú pomace and regional orchard fruits
distilleries.tasting_program: Family manufactory tours and pálinka tastings

distilleries.name: Tokaj-Hétszőlő Furmint Grape Pálinka
distilleries.description: Tokaj-Hétszőlő Organic Vineyard produces estate törkölypálinka from the pomace of its biodynamically farmed Furmint and Hárslevelű grapes. Available at the Rákóczi Pince wine shop in Tokaj town.
distilleries.distillation_method: Organic pomace distillation from biodynamic estate grapes
distilleries.tasting_program: Available for tasting at Rákóczi Pince wine shop; cellar visit includes spirits

distilleries.name: Rákóczi Pince Pálinka and Spirits Selection
distilleries.description: The Rákóczi Pince cellar complex in Tokaj town offers pálinka alongside its wine tasting programme. The wine shop stocks regional pálinka producers alongside Tokaj wines, offering a comparison between Tokaj grape spirits and the main wine styles.
distilleries.distillation_method: Grape pomace and fruit pálinka from regional producers
distilleries.tasting_program: Pálinka tastings available as add-on to cellar wine tasting; wine shop retail
